scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/backend && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/frontend
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/types && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/memory && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/llm && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/planner && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/search && npm run build -w @nextgen-location-search/explain
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend & npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.seed:full: npm run embed && npm run seed
